new_classes.definition_en: Non-sparkling (still) fermented beverages falling under heading 2206, other than piquette (2206 00 10) and sparkling fermented beverages (2206 00 31), including the products described in the HS Explanatory Note to heading 2206 second paragraph (1)–(10) such as cider, perry, mead, sake and other fermented beverages as well as mixtures of fermented beverages or of fermented and non-alcoholic beverages, presented in non-sparkling form.

coverage_explanation: The primary distinguishing criteria captured are: (1) membership in OtherFermentedBeverage (heading 2206), (2) non-sparkling character (complement of CarbonatedQuality via quality restriction), (3) exclusion of Piquette (2206 00 10) and SparklingOtherFermentedBeverage (2206 00 31) as sibling classes. The reference to HS Explanatory Note second paragraph (1)–(10) lists specific product types (cider, perry, mead, sake, rice wine, palm wine, etc.) that are not individually modelled as subclasses or quality restrictions in the current TBox, which limits full coverage. Additionally, the legal note covers a range of subheadings (22060031–22060089 "Other"), and the specific position of 22060039 within that range (non-sparkling, in containers ≤ 2 L vs. > 2 L distinction handled at sibling level) is captured only partially by the non-sparkling quality restriction. The complement restrictions using rdf:type are OWL-DL non-standard and serve only as a documentation proxy; proper disjointness with Piquette and SparklingOtherFermentedBeverage would ideally be expressed via owl:disjointWith axioms, which are not directly supported in the current restrict-only schema. The coverage is reduced accordingly.
